summary: This Excel spreadsheet details the risk analysis required for CE Marking compliance of the AI phone agent system. It outlines specific software and cybersecurity hazards, associated probabilities, and mitigating controls like encryption and data retention policies. The document includes breakdowns of risk factors and reasoning for acceptability within the UK healthcare regulatory context.
